title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
english: A Genoa court has sentenced several former Italian motorway officials to prison terms following the 2018 Morandi bridge collapse that killed 43 people. Giovanni Castellucci, the former CEO of the operating company, received a 12-year sentence for failing to maintain the aging structure. Although defense lawyers pointed to design flaws, the court held various executives and officials responsible for years of neglected repairs.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ. በ 2018 በጄኖዋ የሞራንዲ ድልድይ በመፍረሱ ለ 43 ሰዎች ህይወት መጥፋት ተጠያቂ የሆኑ የቀድሞ የጣሊያን አውራ ጎዳና አስተዳዳሪዎች በእስራት ተቀጡ። የኩባንያው የቀድሞ ዋና ስራ አስፈፃሚ ጆቫኒ ካስቴሉቺ ድልድዩን በአግባቡ ባለመጠገኑ የ12 ዓመት እስራት ተፈርዶበታል። መከላከያ ጠበቆች ለውድቀቱ የዲዛይን ጉድለትን በምክንያትነት ቢጠቅሱም፣ ፍርድ ቤቱ ግን ለአመታት የተዘነጋ የጥገና ስራ ለደረሰው አደጋ ተጠያቂ መሆናቸውን ወስኗል።
oromo: Bara 2018 biyya Xaaliyaanii magaalaa Genoa keessatti darajaa Morandi diigamee lubbuun namoota 43 darbuun isaa kan yaadatamu yoo ta'u, amma qondaaltota kampaanii daandii gurguddaa duraanii irratti murtiin hidhaa darbeera. Hoji gaggeessaan duraanii kampaanii Autostrade, Giovanni Castellucci, akkaataa guddinaa daandii sanaa irratti hordoffii ga'aa waan hin gooneef waggaa 12f hidhameera. Looyyoonni himatamtootaa miidhaan kun kan dhufe hanqina diizaayinii irraa akka ta'e falmanis, mana murtiitti garuu itti gaafatamtoonni kun suphaa yeroon hin godhin irratti himatamanii murtiin kun irratti dabreera.

title: Teenager accused of carrying out sabotage actions in Poland for Russia
english: Polish authorities have charged an 18-year-old Ukrainian national with conducting 47 acts of sabotage on behalf of Russian intelligence. The suspect allegedly sought to create ethnic friction between Poland and Ukraine by vandalizing historical monuments and planning a drone operation. He faces potential life imprisonment for these crimes, which were reportedly funded via cryptocurrency under the direction of foreign intelligence agents.
amharic: የፖላንድ ባለስልጣናት የ18 ዓመት የዩክሬን ዜጋ በሩሲያ የስለላ ድርጅት ስም 47 የጥፋት ድርጊቶችን ፈጽሟል በሚል ከሰዋል። ተጠርጣሪው ታሪካዊ ሐውልቶችን በማበላሸት እና ሰው አልባ አውሮፕላኖችን በመጠቀም በፖላንድ እና በዩክሬን መካከል የዘር ግጭት ለመፍጠር ሞክሯል። በውጭ የስለላ ድርጅት ትዕዛዝ እና በክሪፕቶ ከረንሲ ድጋፍ ወንጀሎቹን ሲፈጽም የነበረው ይህ ወጣት፣ ጥፋተኛ ሆኖ ከተገኘ የዕድሜ ልክ እስራት ሊፈረድበት ይችላል።
oromo: Abbootiin taayitaa Poolaan, dargaggeessa umuriin isaa 18 kan ta'e lammii Yuukreen irratti gocha mancaatii 47 kan raawwate jechuun himatanii jiru. Himatamaan kun gargaarsa basaastota Ruusiyaatiin, harka qullaa yaadannoo seenaa mancaasuufi akkasumas meeshaa xiyyaaraa (drone) fayyadamuun biyyoota Poolaanfi Yuukreen gidduutti walitti bu'iinsa uumuuf yaaleera. Himatamaan kun yoo irratti mirkanaa'e hidhaa guutummaa umurii isaa itti murtaa'uu kan danda'u yommuu ta'u, gocha kanaafis kaffaltii maallaqa dijitaalaan argachaa akka ture ibsameera.

title: World Cup: Why is there a third-place playoff between France and England?
english: France and England are set to face off in the 2026 World Cup's third-place match, also known as the bronze final. This game provides an extra opportunity for teams to secure a podium finish, while helping organizers generate more revenue and fill the schedule before the final. Additionally, the match is significant for individual players as any goals scored count toward the Golden Boot race, which determines the tournament's top scorer.
amharic: ፈረንሳይ እና እንግሊዝ በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ለሶስተኛ ደረጃ ወይም ለነሐስ ሜዳሊያ ጨዋታ ይገናኛሉ። ይህ ጨዋታ ቡድኖች በውድድሩ የተሻለ ደረጃ እንዲይዙ እድል ከመስጠቱም በላይ፣ ለተወዳዳሪዎቹ ተጨማሪ ገቢን ያስገኛል እንዲሁም ለፍጻሜው ጨዋታ የቀድሞ መርሃ ግብርን ይሞላል። በተጨማሪም በዚህ ጨዋታ የሚቆጠሩ ጎሎች ለወርቃማው ጫማ ሽልማት ስለሚታሰብ፣ ለተጫዋቾች የግል ብቃት መለኪያነት ትልቅ ቦታ አለው።
oromo: Faransaayiifi Ingiliiziin tapha itti-aanaa ykn kan sadarkaa sadaffaa qabachuuf taphatamu irratti wal-morkatu. Taphi kun gareeleen sadarkaa sadaffaa akka argatan kan gargaaru yoo ta'u, qindeessitootaafis galii dabalataa argamsiisuufi guyyaa tapha xumuraa dura bakka duwwaa guutuuf gargaara. Kana malees, taphattooti tapha kana irratti goolii lakkoofsisan badhaasa 'Golden Boot' ykn goolii hedduu galcheef ooluu waan danda'uuf, taphichi taphattootaaf faayidaa guddaa qaba.

title: How World Cup football jerseys became political fashion in Latin America
english: In countries like Brazil and Colombia, political figures are increasingly using national football jerseys to promote their agendas and symbolize patriotism. While these shirts are traditionally seen as emblems of national pride and unity, their adoption by far-right movements has sparked controversy and division among citizens. Experts suggest that politicians use these sports uniforms to easily tap into public sentiment and exploit national identity for electoral gain.
amharic: እንደ ብራዚል እና ኮሎምቢያ ባሉ ሀገራት የፖለቲካ መሪዎች የሀገራቸውን ብሔራዊ የእግር ኳስ ማሊያ የፖለቲካ ዓላማቸውን ለማራመድ እና እንደ ሀገር ወዳድነት ምልክት እየተጠቀሙበት ይገኛሉ። ምንም እንኳን እነዚህ ማሊያዎች እንደ ብሔራዊ ኩራት እና አንድነት መገለጫ ቢታዩም፣ በአክራሪ የፖለቲካ ቡድኖች መታጀባቸው በዜጎች መካከል አለመግባባትን እየፈጠረ ነው። ተንታኞች እንደሚሉት ከሆነ ፖለቲከኞች እነዚህን የክለብ ትጥቆች የሚጠቀሙት የህዝብን ስሜት ለመቆጣጠር እና ለምርጫ ድል ለመጠቀም ነው።
oromo: Akkuma biyyoota Biraazil fi Kolombiyaa keessatti mul'atu, hogganoonni siyaasaa uffata taphattoota kubbaa miilaa biyyoolessaa ajandaa siyaasaa isaanii fi mallattoo jaalala biyyaa godhatanii fayyadamaa jiru. Uffanni kun akka mallattoo tokkummaa fi boonaa biyyaatti kan ilaalamu ta'us, gareewwan siyaasaa mirga-raree (far-right) ta'aniin fudhatamuun isaa uummata gidduutti wal dhabdee fi addaan bahiinsa uumaa jira. Ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, siyaasni kun kan gaggeeffamu miira uummataa hawwachuufi bu'aa filannoo argachuuf jecha mallattoo biyyoolessaa kana itti fayyadamuun ta'uu ibsu.

title: Epstein linked to Israeli ‘deep state’, US intel, says Vance: What we know
english: US Vice President JD Vance recently suggested that Jeffrey Epstein maintained significant ties to both American and Israeli intelligence agencies. During a podcast appearance, Vance also admitted that the previous Trump administration failed to properly handle public communication regarding the Epstein case files. Epstein, a convicted sex offender who died in prison in 2019, was notorious for his extensive network of connections among global elites.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ምክትል ፕሬዝዳንት ጄዲ ቫንስ፣ ጄፍሪ ኤፕስታይን ከአሜሪካ እና ከእስራኤል የስለላ ተቋማት ጋር ጠንካራ ግንኙነት እንደነበረው በቅርቡ ተናግረዋል። በቃለ መጠይቁ ላይ ቫንስ የትራምፕ አስተዳደር ከኤፕስታይን የክስ ፋይሎች ጋር በተያያዘ ህዝባዊ ግንኙነቶችን በመምራት ረገድ ስህተት እንደፈፀሙ አምነዋል። በ2019 በእስር ቤት የሞተው እና በወሲባዊ ወንጀል የተፈረደበት ኤፕስታይን፣ በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ በሀብታሞች እና ተፅዕኖ ፈጣሪዎች መካከል ሰፊ ትውውቅ የነበረው ሰው ነበር።
oromo: Itti aantuun pirezidantii Amerikaa JD Vance, Jeffrey Epstein qaamolee sanyii hubannoo Amerikaa fi Israa'elii wajjin walitti dhufeenya cimaa akka qabu ibsaniiru. Hirmaannaa sagantaa raadiyoo irratti, Vance mootummaan Traamp darbe galmee dhimma Epstein ilaalchisee odeeffannoo kennu irratti dogoggora akka raawwate amaniiru. Epstein, yakka saalaa raawwatee bara 2019 mana hidhaatti kan du’e, namoota addunyaa irra jiran aango qabeeyyii fi badhaadhoota gidduutti walitti dhufeenya bal’aa kan qabu ture.

title: US or Iran — Who needs a new truce deal more?
english: The United States and Iran have resumed active hostilities after their June ceasefire agreement collapsed, leading to a new cycle of regional strikes. While both governments publicly display defiance and skepticism toward negotiations, they face significant economic and military strains that complicate a long-term conflict. Pakistan has urged both parties to return to diplomacy, as internal pressures make a full-scale war increasingly difficult for either side to sustain.
amharic: የአሜሪካ እና የኢራን ግንኙነት ሰኔ ወር ላይ የተፈረመው የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት በመፍረሱ ምክንያት ወደ ቀድሞ ግጭት ተመልሷል። ሁለቱም ሀገራት ለዲፕሎማሲያዊ ንግግሮች ያላቸውን ጥርጣሬ በይፋ ቢገልጹም፣ እየደረሰባቸው ባለው የኢኮኖሚ እና ወታደራዊ ጫና ምክንያት ረዘም ላለ ጊዜ የሚቆይ ጦርነት መቋቋም ይከብዳቸዋል። ፓኪስታን ሁለቱንም ወገኖች ወደ ድርድር እንዲመለሱ ጥሪ ያቀረበች ሲሆን፣ ውስጣዊ ችግሮች ሁለቱንም ሀገራት ወደ ሙሉ ጦርነት እንዳያመሩ እንደገደባቸው ይነገራል።
oromo: waliigalteen dhaabbii waraanaa ji'a waxabajjii keessa mallatteeffame diigamuu isaa hordofee, Amerikaa fi Iraan deebi'anii wal waraana jiru. Mootummoonni lamaanuu dubbii cimaa dubbatanis, miidhaa diinagdee fi lolaan irra ga'aa jiru irraa kan ka'e waraana dheeraa itti fufuu akka hin dandeenye himama. Paakistaan garee lamaanillee gara mariitti akka deebi'an gaafatteetti; dhiibbaan biyya keessaa fi diinagdee garuu waraana bal'aa gaggeessuun akka isaanitti ulfaatu taasiseera.

title: Sudanese minister says war has ‘profoundly reshaped’ nation’s demographics
english: Sudan’s ongoing civil war has caused a major demographic shift by displacing millions of people and drastically increasing poverty throughout the nation. The conflict has forced citizens to flee their homes, caused widespread job losses, and crippled essential social services. In response, government officials are now working to update population policies to better support displaced individuals and help rebuild the country's social stability.
amharic: በሱዳን እየተካሄደ ያለው የእርስ በርስ ጦርነት በሚሊዮኖች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎችን ከመኖሪያቸው በማፈናቀል እና ድህነትን በማባባስ የሀገሪቱን የህዝብ ስብጥር በእጅጉ ለውጦታል። ግጭቱ ዜጎች ቤታቸውን ጥለው እንዲሰደዱ፣ የስራ እድል እንዲያጡ እና መሰረታዊ አገልግሎቶች እንዲስተጓጎሉ አድርጓል። ለዚህ ችግር መፍትሄ ለመስጠት የመንግስት ባለስልጣናት የተፈናቀሉትን ለመርዳት እና የሀገሪቱን ማህበራዊ መሰረት እንደገና ለመገንባት የሚያስችሉ የህዝብ ቁጥር ፖሊሲዎችን በማሻሻል ላይ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Waraanni biyya Sudaan keessatti adeemaa jiru namoota miliyoonaan lakkaa'aman buqqisuu fi hiyyummaa hammeessuun caasaa ummataa biyyattii jijjiiruu danda'eera. Walitti bu'iinsi kun lammiileen manneen isaanii akka gadhiisan, hojii akka dhaban fi tajaajiloonni bu'uuraa akka hin hojjenne godheera. Kanaan walqabatee, mootummaan namoota buqqa'an gargaaruu fi tasgabbii hawaasummaa deebisanii ijaaruuf imaammata ummataa irratti hojjechaa jira.

title: Saudi Arabia condemns Iran's attacks in Gulf states
english: Saudi Arabia has officially denounced recent Iranian military actions targeting Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan. The Saudi government emphasized that these aggressive acts jeopardize regional security and stability. Furthermore, Riyadh urged all involved parties to prioritize diplomatic solutions to resolve their ongoing disputes.
amharic: ሳዑዲ አረቢያ በኩዌት፣ በባህሬን እና በዮርዳኖስ ላይ ኢራን የፈጸመችውን ጥቃት በይፋ አውግዛለች። የሳዑዲ መንግስት እነዚህ ድርጊቶች የክልሉን ሰላምና መረጋጋት አደጋ ላይ የሚጥሉ መሆናቸውን ገልጿል። በመሆኑም የተፈጠሩ አለመግባባቶች በዲፕሎማሲያዊ መንገድ እንዲፈቱ ጥሪ አቅርቧል።
oromo: Saudii Arabiyaan haleellaa Iiraan biyyoota Kuweeyt, Baahireen fi Yordaanos irratti raawwatte balaaleeffatteetti. Mootummaan Saudii tarkaanfiin kun nageenyaa fi tasgabbii naannichaa kan miidhu ta'uu ibseera. Kanaafuu, garuun hundi wal dhabdee isaanii karaa marii dippiloomaasiitiin akka furatan gaafateera.

title: Inside Khamenei's funeral: Revealing moments from a week of mourning
english: Following the assassination of Iran's long-time Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in a US-Israeli strike, his son Mojtaba Khamenei has succeeded him after a week of widespread funeral processions. During the ceremonies, organizers caused controversy by reciting specific Quranic verses that carried implied political critiques toward visiting Saudi and Qatari delegations. These events highlighted ongoing internal tensions and power struggles within Iran's political landscape during the transition of leadership.
amharic: የኢራኑ ከፍተኛ መሪ አያቶላህ አሊ ካሜኒ በአሜሪካ እና በእስራኤል ጥቃት ከተገደሉ በኋላ፣ ለሳምንት የቆየ የቀብር ሥነ-ሥርዓት ተካሂዶ ልጃቸው ሞጅታባ ካሜኒ ተተኪ ሆነው ተሹመዋል። በቀብር ሥነ-ሥርዓቱ ላይ አዘጋጆች የሳዑዲ እና የኳታር ልዑካን በተገኙበት ወቅት ያስተላለፏቸው የተመረጡ የቁርአን ጥቅሶች የፖለቲካ መልእክት ያዘሉ በመሆናቸው ውዝግብ ፈጥረዋል። ይህ ክስተት በኢራን የሥልጣን ሽግግር ወቅት ያለውን የፖለቲካ አለመረጋጋት እና ውስጣዊ የኃይል አሰላለፍ ያሳያል።
oromo: Hogganaan olaanaa Iran Ayatollah Ali Khamenei weerara Ameerikaa fi Israa'elitiin ajjeefamanii torban tokkoof erga gaddaa booda, ilmi isaanii Mojtaba Khamenei bakka bu'anii aangoo qabataniiru. Sirna awwaalchaa kana irratti, qindeessitoonni ergaa siyaasaa of keessaa qabu jedhamee kan ibsame aayota Qur'aanaa filatamoo ta'an bakka ergamtoonni Saudii fi Qatar jiranitti dubbisuun isaanii mormii fi yaada wal-dhabdee kaaseera. Taatee kun, Iran keessatti ce'umsa aangoo kana waliin walqabatee rakkoolee siyaasaa fi walitti bu'iinsa keessoo biyyattii mul'iseera.

title: Dua Lipa backs Albania’s ‘Flamingo Revolution’ against Kushner-backed resort
english: Pop star Dua Lipa is supporting protesters in Albania who are opposing a massive luxury resort project linked to Jared Kushner. The development, planned for an environmentally protected coastal area, faces criticism for threatening the natural habitats of various wildlife. Lipa condemned the government's decision to bypass public consultation and weaken environmental laws to allow the construction to proceed.
amharic: ታዋቂዋ ዘፋኝ ዱአ ሊፓ በአልባኒያ በጃሬድ ኩሽነር የሚመራውን የቅንጦት የመዝናኛ ስፍራ ግንባታ የሚቃወሙ ተቃዋሚዎችን ትደግፋለች። በአካባቢ ጥበቃ በተደረገላቸው የባህር ዳርቻዎች ላይ የታቀደው ይህ ፕሮጀክት፣ ለተለያዩ የዱር እንስሳት መኖሪያዎች ስጋት በመፍጠሩ ተቃውሞ ገጥሞታል። ሊፓ መንግስት ለግንባታው ሲል የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ህጎችን በማሻሻሉ እና ህዝብን ሳያማክር ውሳኔውን በማሳለፉ ቅሬታዋን ገልጻለች።
oromo: Faarfattuun beekamtuun Dua Lipa, Albaniyaa keessatti ijaarsa iddoo boqonnaa qananii kan Jared Kushner-tiin hogganamu mormaa kan jiran hiriiroonni deeggarsa ishee argatan. Lafa eegumsa qabu kan irratti karoorfame kana, uumamaafi bineensota bosonaa irratti miidhaa geessisuu danda'a jedhamee sodaatama. Dua Lipa, mootummaan saba mari'achiisuu malee seera eegumsa naannoo jijjiiruun ijaarsa kana hayyamuu isaa balaaleffatteetti.

title: Israeli ministers taunt England and revel in Argentina’s World Cup win
english: Several Israeli government ministers publicly celebrated Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England through social media posts. Figures including Bezalel Smotrich and Itamar Ben Gvir used the result to taunt the British government, which had previously imposed sanctions on them for their roles in West Bank policies and the Gaza conflict. Foreign Minister Gideon Sa’ar and UN Ambassador Danny Danon also joined in the celebrations, highlighting the growing political alliance between Israel and Argentina's current leadership.
amharic: የእስራኤል መንግስት ሚኒስትሮች አርጀንቲና በዓለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍጻሜ በእንግሊዝ ላይ ያገኘችውን ድል በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ በይፋ አክብረዋል። እንደ ቤዛሌል ስሞትሪች እና ኢታማር ቤን ግቪር ያሉ ባለስልጣናት ይህንን ውጤት በመጠቀም በምዕራብ ባንክ እና በጋዛ ግጭት ባላቸው ሚና ምክንያት ማዕቀብ የጣለባቸውን የብሪታንያ መንግስት በፌዝ ተንኩሰዋል። የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትሩ ጊዲዮን ሳር እና የተባበሩት መንግስታት አምባሳደሩ ዳኒ ዳኖን በድሉ በመቀላቀል በእስራኤል እና በአርጀንቲና አመራሮች መካከል ያለውን የቅርብ የፖለቲካ ግንኙነት አሳይተዋል።
oromo: Ministeerota mootummaan Israa'el tokko tokko injifannoo Arjentiinaan tapha waancaa addunyaa walakkaa xumuraarratti Ingilizirratti argatte miidiyaa hawaasummarraatti gammachuun ibsataniiru. Ministaroonni akka Bezalel Smotrich fi Itamar Ben Gvir injifannoo kana fayyadamun mootummaa Biritaaniyaa isaanirratti tarkaanfii fudhate qoosaniiru; kunis kan ta'e erga Biritaaniyaan ilaalcha isaanii kan naannoo Lixaa (West Bank) fi waraana Gaazaa irratti qabanirratti hundaa'uun isaanirratti dhiibbaa godhatee boodadha. Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Gideon Sa’ar fi ambaasaaddarri tokkummaa mootummootaa Danny Danon gamachuun kanatti makamuun, hariiroo siyaasaa Israa'el fi hogganoota Arjentiinaa gidduu jiru kan ibsu ta'eera.

title: Iranian press review: Political figures expect continued but limited confrontation with US
english: Prominent Iranian political figures recently stated that a large-scale war between Iran and the United States is improbable. Most officials believe that while minor military skirmishes and diplomatic tension will persist, neither nation wants a full-blown conflict. Experts suggest that the current pattern of limited confrontations is likely to remain the status quo for the near future.
amharic: የኢራን የፖለቲካ ሰዎች በኢራን እና በአሜሪካ መካከል ሰፊ የሆነ ጦርነት የመከሰቱ ዕድል አነስተኛ እንደሆነ ገልጸዋል። አብዛኛዎቹ ባለስልጣናት ሁለቱም ሀገራት ሙሉ በሙሉ ወደ ጦርነት ለመግባት ፍላጎት እንደሌላቸው ያምናሉ። ሆኖም የተወሰኑ ወታደራዊ ግጭቶች እና ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ውጥረቶች ለተወሰነ ጊዜ እንደሚቀጥሉ ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni siyaasaa Iran akka jedhanitti, gidduu Iran fi Ameerikaatti waraanni bal’aan uumamuun isaa waan hin oolle miti. Aangonni hedduun akka amananitti, biyyoonni lameenuu waraana guutuu keessa galuuf fedhii akka hin qabne ibsaniiru. Ta’us, walitti bu’iinsi waraanaa daangeffamee fi dhiphinni diippilomaasii yeroo dhiyootti itti fufuu akka danda’u eerameera.

title: More than 800 Canadian wildfires burning as air quality alerts extend to US
english: Over 800 wildfires are currently burning across Canada, with most of them considered out of control. The thick smoke from these fires has drifted south, triggering hazardous air quality warnings across various US states and the Great Lakes region. Experts expect the poor air conditions to persist through the weekend due to wind patterns, though air quality may begin to improve by early next week.
amharic: በአሁኑ ወቅት በካናዳ ከ800 በላይ የዱር እሳቶች እየተቃጠሉ ሲሆን አብዛኛዎቹ ከቁጥጥር ውጪ ሆነዋል። ከእነዚህ እሳቶች የሚመነጨው ከፍተኛ ጭስ ወደ ደቡብ አቅጣጫ በመጓዝ በአሜሪካ ግዛቶች እና በታላላቅ ሐይቆች አካባቢ የአየር ጥራትን አደገኛ ደረጃ ላይ አድርሷል። የንፋስ አቅጣጫ በመቀያየሩ ምክንያት ይህ የተበከለ አየር እስከ ሳምንቱ መጨረሻ ድረስ ሊቀጥል እንደሚችል የሚጠበቅ ቢሆንም፣ በሚቀጥለው ሳምንት መጀመሪያ ላይ የአየር ሁኔታው መሻሻል እንደሚታይበት ይጠበቃል።
oromo: yeroo ammaa kana kanadaa keessatti ibidda bosonaa 800 ol kan gubachaa jiran yoo ta'u, hedduun isaanii to'annoo ala ta'anii jiru. Aaraan ibidda kanaa gara kibbaatti babal'achuun isaa, naannoowwan yunaayitid isteetsii fi naannoo haroowwan gurguddoo keessatti qilleensi akka faalamu taasiseera. Sababa qilleensi sun gara kaaba Ameerikatti qajeeleef, haalli qilleensaa hanga dhuma torbanittis kan itti fufu yoo ta'u, torban dhufu jalqaba irratti garuu qilleensi kun fooyya'uu danda'a jedhamee eegama.

title: Volunteer firefighter suspected of starting devastating France forest fire
english: A teenage volunteer firefighter is under investigation in France for allegedly starting a massive wildfire in the Fontainebleau forest near Paris. The blaze has scorched about 10% of the historic woodland and forced roughly 1,000 people to evacuate their homes. President Emmanuel Macron has condemned the act, noting that France is facing an unusually high number of wildfires amid extreme heat and climate change.
amharic: በፈረንሳይ በፓሪስ አቅራቢያ በሚገኘው የፎንቴንብሎ ደን ውስጥ በተነሳው ከፍተኛ የእሳት ቃጠሎ ወንጀል የተጠረጠረ አንድ የጎልማሳ የበጎ ፈቃደኛ የእሳት አደጋ ተከላካይ ምርመራ እየተካሄደበት ነው። እሳቱ ታሪካዊ የደን መሬትን ያወደመ ሲሆን ወደ አንድ ሺህ የሚጠጉ ሰዎችን ከመኖሪያቸው እንዲፈናቀሉ አስገድዷል። ፕሬዝዳንት አማኑኤል ማክሮን ድርጊቱን ያወገዙ ሲሆን ፈረንሳይ በአየር ንብረት ለውጥ እና በከፍተኛ ሙቀት ምክንያት ከባድ የእሳት አደጋዎች እየገጠሟት መሆኑን አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Faransaay keessatti, namni umriin isaa waggaa 18 ta'eefi gargaaraa dhaamsa ibiddaa dhaabichaa ta'e tokko, bosona Fontainebleau kan Paariisitti dhihoo jiru keessatti ibidduma gubataa kaaseera jedhamee shakkamee qorannoon irratti gaggeeffamaa jira. Ibidni kun bosona seena-qabeessa sana keessaa harka 10 kan gube yoo ta'u, namoonni kuma tokko ta'an bakka jireenya isaanii gadhiisanii akka baqatan dirqisiiseera. Pireezidaanti Imaanueel Maakroon gochicha balaaleffachuun, Faransaay jijjiirama qilleensaa fi ho'a qilleensaa cimaa mudateen walqabatee ibidda bosonaa hedduu keessa akka jirtu ibsaniiru.

title: Thousands to lose their homes as Ivory Coast demolitions begin
english: Authorities in Ivory Coast have started a widespread demolition campaign in the Attecoube district, forcing thousands of residents from their homes. The government states these houses were built illegally on public land and pose significant safety threats due to potential floods and landslides. Many families are now facing displacement as the structures are leveled by officials.
amharic: የአይቮሪ ኮስት ባለስልጣናት በአቴኩቤ አውራጃ በህገ-ወጥ መንገድ የተገነቡ ናቸው ባሏቸው መኖሪያ ቤቶች ላይ መጠነ ሰፊ የማፍረስ ዘመቻ ጀምረዋል። መንግስት እርምጃውን የወሰደው ቤቶቹ ለጎርፍ እና ለመሬት መንሸራተት አደጋ በተጋለጡ ቦታዎች ላይ በመሆናቸው ነዋሪዎችን ለመጠበቅ ነው ብሏል። በዚህ ተግባር ምክንያት በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎች መኖሪያ ቤታቸውን በማጣታቸው ለችግር ተጋልጠዋል።
oromo: Mootummaan biyya Ivory Coast aanaa Attecoube keessatti manneen seeraan alaa ta'an jedhee amane irratti tarkaanfii diiggaa guddaa eegaleera. Mootummaan akka jedhutti, manneen kunneen kan ijaaraman lafa mootummaa irratti fi bakka balaa lolaa fi lafti itti sigigituu danda'u waan ta'eef gadi jedhamee kaafameera. Sababa kanaanis namoonni kumaatamaan lakka'aman manaa fi bakka jireenyaa isaanii dhabanii rakkoof saaxilamaniiru.

title: Iran claims strikes on US bases, warns of wider attacks on region
english: Iran has issued a stern warning that it will destroy regional infrastructure if the United States persists with its military strikes against the country. The Iranian government also asserted that it will actively prevent American interference in the Strait of Hormuz. These threats signal a significant escalation in tensions between the two nations.
amharic: አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ የምታደርገውን ጥቃት የምትቀጥል ከሆነ የክልሉን መሰረተ ልማቶች እንደምትደመስስ ኢራን አስጠነቀቀች። የኢራን መንግስት አሜሪካ በሆርሙዝ ባህር ላይ ጣልቃ እንድትገባ እንደማይፈቅድም ገልጿል። ይህ የኢራን ማስፈራሪያ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ውጥረት እየተባባሰ መምጣቱን ያሳያል።
oromo: Iraan, yoo Ameerikaan haleellaa ishee irratti godhamu itti fufte, bu'uuraalee misoomaa naannichaa akka barbadeessitu akeekkachiisteetti. Mootummaan Iraan, Ameerikaan daandii galaana Hormuz keessatti akka hin seene cimsinee dhoorgina jedheera. Akeekkachiisni kun walitti bu'iinsa biyyoota lamaan gidduu jiru daran kan hammaate ta'uu agarsiisa.

title: EU court upholds Spanish amnesty law as compatible with EU law
english: The European Union's highest court has ruled that Spain's amnesty law for Catalan separatists is consistent with EU regulations. This legislation, introduced by Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez, aims to ease political tensions and resolve past criminal cases related to the region's independence movement. By clearing these legal hurdles, the decision supports the government's reconciliation efforts and may allow exiled leaders to return to Spain.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት ከፍተኛ ፍርድ ቤት የስፔን መንግስት ለካታሎኒያ ነጻ አውጪዎች የሰጠው የምህረት ህግ ከአውሮፓ ህብረት ህግ ጋር የሚጣጣም መሆኑን ወስኗል። ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ፔድሮ ሳንቼዝ ያመጡት ይህ ህግ የፖለቲካ ውጥረትን ለመቀነስ እና ከክልሉ ነጻነት ጋር በተያያዘ የተከሰቱ የቀድሞ የወንጀል ክሶችን ለመፍታት ያለመ ነው። ፍርድ ቤቱ ይህንን ውሳኔ ማስተላለፉ ለመንግስት የእርቅ ጥረቶች ትልቅ ድጋፍ ሲሆን፣ በስደት ላይ የሚገኙ መሪዎች ወደ አገራቸው እንዲመለሱ መንገድ ሊከፍት ይችላል።
oromo: Mana murtii olaanaa Gamtaa Awurooppaa, seera dhiifamaa mootummaan Ispeen garee adda ba'uu fedhan Kaataalooniyaaf baase seera Gamtaa Awurooppaa kan hin faallessine ta'uu murteesseera. Seerri Muummicha Ministeeraa Peedroo Saancheezin dhiyaate kun, jijjiirama siyaasaa fiduufi dhimmoota seeraa kanaan dura walaba ta'uu naannichaa waliin walqabatanii turan xumuruuf kan kaayyeeffatedha. Murtiin kun, carraaqqii araaraa mootummaan taasisaa jiru kan deeggaru yoo ta'u, hoogganoonni biyyaa baqatanii turan gara Ispeen deebi'uuf karaa kan baneera.

title: Venezuela’s recovery clouded by uncertainty three weeks after earthquake
english: Three weeks after a deadly earthquake in Venezuela, rescue operations have ended and the focus has turned toward long-term reconstruction. At least 4,829 people lost their lives in the tragedy, leaving behind widespread destruction. However, survivors and local communities are struggling with deep uncertainty as the government has yet to provide clear details on its recovery plans.
amharic: ቬኔዙዌላ ውስጥ ገዳይ የሆነው የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ከተከሰተ ሶስት ሳምንታት በኋላ፣ የነፍስ አድን ስራዎች ተጠናቀው ትኩረቱ ወደ መልሶ ግንባታ ተቀይሯል። በዚህ አደጋ ቢያንስ 4,829 ሰዎች ህይወታቸውን ያጡ ሲሆን፣ አገሪቱ ከፍተኛ ውድመት ደርሶባታል። ይሁን እንጂ መንግስት የመልሶ ግንባታ እቅዱን በተመለከተ ግልጽ መረጃ ባለመስጠቱ የተጎዱት ማህበረሰቦች ከፍተኛ ስጋት ውስጥ ናቸው።
oromo: Venezuela keessatti raafama lafaa cimaa erga mudatee torban sadii booda, hojiin lubbuu oolchuu xumuramee xiyyeeffannoon gara ijaarsa deebii uumuu jijjiirameera. Balaa kanaan namoonni 4,829 ol ta'an lubbuun kan darban yoo ta'u, miidhaan guddaan geessiseera. Haa ta'u malee, mootummaan karoora ijaarsa deebii irratti ibsa ifa ta'e waan hin kennineef, hawaasni miidhame kun keessa jiruuf jireenyi isaanii yaaddoo keessa bu'eera.

title: ‘Destroyed my whole life’: Lebanese families wiped out in Israeli attacks
english: Hussein Saleh, a Lebanese resident, lost his entire family, including his pregnant wife and young daughter, during a devastating Israeli airstrike in Tyre last March. This tragedy is part of a series of attacks investigated by Amnesty International, which found that 24 civilians, including many children, were killed without clear military justification. Amnesty International is now calling for a formal war crimes investigation, noting that these strikes failed to protect innocent civilians or distinguish between military and residential targets.
amharic: ሁሴን ሳሌህ የተባሉ የሊባኖስ ነዋሪ ባለፈው መጋቢት ወር በጢሮስ ከተማ በተፈጸመ የቦምብ ጥቃት እርጉዝ ሚስታቸውን እና የልጅ ልጃቸውን ጨምሮ መላ ቤተሰባቸውን አጥተዋል። ይህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት አምነስቲ ኢንተርናሽናል እየመረመረው ካለው ተከታታይ ጥቃቶች መካከል አንዱ ሲሆን፣ በነዚህ ጥቃቶች ብዙ ህጻናትን ጨምሮ 24 ንጹሃን ዜጎች ያለ ምንም ወታደራዊ ምክንያት ህይወታቸውን አጥተዋል። አምነስቲ ኢንተርናሽናል ጥቃቶቹ ሲቪሎችን ከመከላከል እና ወታደራዊ ኢላማዎችን ከመለየት ረገድ የከሸፉ በመሆናቸው እንደ የጦር ወንጀል እንዲጣሩ ጠይቋል።
oromo: Hussein Saleh jedhamu kan jiraattu magaalaa Liibaanoos, qilleensarraa haleellaa Israa'el godheen ji'a darbe keessa maatii isaa guutuu, haadha manaa isaanii kan ulfaafi intala isaanii xiqqoo dhabaniiru. Balaan kun qorannoo 'Amnesty International' taasisaa jiru keessatti kan hammatame yoo ta'u, haleellaa kanaan namoonni nagaa 24 ta'an kan ajjeefaman yoo ta'u, isaan keessaas ijoolleen baay'een jiru. 'Amnesty International' haleellaan kunneen namoota nagaa eeguu fi bakka waraanaa adda baasuu irratti hanqina guddaa kan qaban waan ta'eef, akka yakka waraanaatti qoratamu gaafataa jira.

title: Britain's Big Brother state is already here - we just don't realise it yet
english: The British Court of Appeal has ruled the ban on the activist group Palestine Action as lawful, overturning a previous decision. The article argues that Britain is gradually shifting toward authoritarianism, characterized by reduced civil liberties and increased state surveillance. It suggests that both major political parties and mainstream media are undermining democratic freedoms to protect the interests of the powerful.
amharic: የብሪታንያ ይግባኝ ሰሚ ፍርድ ቤት የፍልስጤም አክቲቪስት ቡድንን ለመከልከል የተወሰነው ውሳኔ ህጋዊ መሆኑን አረጋግጧል። መጣጥፉ እንደሚጠቁመው ብሪታንያ ቀስ በቀስ ወደ አምባገነንነት እያመራች ሲሆን ይህም የዜጎች መብቶች መገደብ እና የስለላ ተግባራት መጨመርን ያካትታል። የዋና ዋና የፖለቲካ ፓርቲዎች እና የመገናኛ ብዙኃን የሥልጣን ባለቤቶችን ፍላጎት ለማስጠበቅ ሲሉ ዲሞክራሲያዊ ነጻነቶችን እያዳከሙ መሆናቸውንም ይገልጻል።
oromo: Mana murtii ol'aanaa Britaanitti argamu tokko, garee falmitoota 'Palestine Action' jedhamu irratti dhorkaan kaa'ame akka seera qabeessa ta'e murteesseera. Barruun kun, Britaanin gara sirna abbaa irrummaatti suuta deemaa akka jirtu fi kunis mirga namoomaa fi hordoffii mootummaan taasisuun kan ibsamu ta'uu eeru. Paartileen siyaasaa gurguddoo fi miidiyaaleen biyyattii faayidaa qaamota aangoo irra jiraniif jecha mirgoota dimokiraasii akka laafisaa jiran dubbata.

title: Israeli opposition tops new poll as Netanyahu allies explore voting restrictions
english: A recent poll suggests that Israel's opposition parties could secure a narrow parliamentary majority in the upcoming October 27 election, potentially unseating Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Meanwhile, allies of the current government are reportedly exploring measures to restrict voting, such as limiting flights for citizens living abroad and reducing polling stations in assisted-living facilities. These proposed changes appear aimed at hindering groups of voters who typically oppose the current administration.
amharic: አዲስ የሕዝብ አስተያየት ጥናት እንደሚያሳየው በእስራኤል የተቃዋሚ ፓርቲዎች በጥቅምት 27 በሚካሄደው ምርጫ አነስተኛ የፓርላማ አብላጫ ድምፅ በማግኘት ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንያሚን ኔታንያሁንን ከስልጣን ሊያነሱ ይችላሉ። በሌላ በኩል፣ የኔታንያሁን አጋሮች በውጭ የሚኖሩ እስራኤላውያን ወደ ሀገር ቤት እንዳይመለሱ በረራዎችን መገደብ እና በዕድሜ የገፉ ሰዎች መኖሪያ አካባቢዎች የድምጽ መስጫ ጣቢያዎችን መቀነስን የመሳሰሉ የምርጫ ገደቦችን እያጤኑ ነው። እነዚህ እርምጃዎች አሁን ያለውን መንግስት የሚቃወሙ መራጮችን ድምጽ ለማስተጓጎል የታለሙ ይመስላሉ።
oromo: qorannoon yaadota uummataa haaraa akka agarsiisutti, paartileen mormitootaa Israa'el filannoo Onkololeessa 27 gaggeeffamu irratti sagalee caalmaa argachuun muummee ministiraa Benyaamin Neetaanyaahuu aangoo irraa kaasuuf carraa qabu. Gama biraatiin, deggertoonni mootummaa ammaa kunneen biyya alaatti kan jiraatan lammiileen Israa'el akka hin filanneef balaliin xiyyaaraa akka daangeffamu fi manneen jireenyaa manguddoota keessatti bakkeen itti sagalee kennan akka hir'atu gochuuf mala diriirsaa jiru. Tarkaanfileen kunneenis qaamolee mootummaa ammaa mormaan sagalee kennuu isaanii hir'isuuf kan kaayyeffatan fakkaata.

title: Iran asks Houthis to close Bab al-Mandeb if US attacks power network
english: Iran has reportedly instructed Houthi rebels in Yemen to block the Bab al-Mandeb Strait if the United States targets Iranian power infrastructure. This vital maritime route, which links the Red Sea to the Indian Ocean, faces a significant risk of disruption. Saudi Arabian officials are closely monitoring the situation as the militant group prepares to potentially restrict international shipping.
amharic: ኢራን በአሜሪካ የሚሰነዘር የኃይል መሠረተ ልማት ጥቃት ቢኖር፣ በየመን የሚገኙት የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች የባብ አል-ማንደብ ባህር ዳርቻን እንዲዘጉ ማዘዟ ተዘግቧል። ቀይ ባህርን ከህንድ ውቅያኖስ ጋር የሚያገናኘው ይህ ወሳኝ የባህር መስመር በአደጋ ውስጥ እንደሚገኝ ተነግሯል። የሳውዲ አረቢያ ባለስልጣናት ታጣቂዎቹ የንግድ መርከቦችን እንቅስቃሴ ለማስተጓጎል ዝግጅት እያደረጉ በመሆኑ ሁኔታውን በጥንቃቄ እየተከታተሉት ነው።
oromo: Iraan, yoo Ameerikaan lafa bu'uuraa humna ibsaa ishee irratti haleellaa raawwatte, hoggantoota Hutiin Yemen jiran balbala galaana Baab al-Mandeb akka cufan ajajuun gabaafame. Daandiin galaanaa murteessaan qulqulluun daldala addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa uumuu danda'u kun, yeroo ammaa soda guddaa keessa jira. Mootummaan Sa'udii Arabaa gareen kun markablee daldalaa gufachiisuuf qophiirra waan jiraniif, haala kana hordofaa jira.

title: UAE condemns Iranian attacks in Gulf states
english: The United Arab Emirates has officially denounced recent drone and missile strikes carried out by Iran against Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan. In an official statement, the UAE expressed its firm support for these nations and their right to take necessary actions to protect their sovereignty. The country emphasized its commitment to regional security in response to these aggressive hostilities.
amharic: የተባበሩት አረብ ኢምሬቶች ኢራን በባህሬን፣ በኩዌት እና በዮርዳኖስ ላይ የፈጸመችውን የድሮን እና የሚሳኤል ጥቃት በጽኑ አውግዛለች። ሀገሪቱ ለተጠቀሱት ሀገራት ሙሉ ድጋፏን የገለጸች ሲሆን፣ የየሀገራቱን ሉዓላዊነትና ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ የሚወሰዱ ማናቸውንም እርምጃዎች እንደምትደግፍ አስታውቃለች። ይህ ድርጊት በክልሉ ሰላም ላይ የሚያሳድረው ተጽዕኖ ከፍተኛ ስጋት የፈጠረ መሆኑም ተመልክቷል።
oromo: Emireetota Arabaa Gamtoomani, weerara Iiraan biyyoota Baahireen, Kuweetii fi Joordaan irratti xiyyaara maleeyyuu fi mizeeliin geggeessite cimsee balaaleffateera. Mootummaan Emireetotaa biyyoota miidhaan irra ga'e kanaaf gumaacha guutuu kan qabu ta'uu ibsuun, nageenya isaanii kabachiisuuf tarkaanfii fudhatan hunda deggeruu isaa beeksiseera. Kunis tasgabbii naannichaa eeguuf fedhii inni qabu kan agarsiisuudha.

title: Kuwaiti army intercepts Iranian drones
english: The Kuwaiti military has officially reported that its air defense systems are currently engaging and intercepting hostile Iranian drones. Officials have advised citizens that any loud explosions heard in the area are caused by these defensive operations. The public is urged to remain calm and strictly follow official safety guidelines while the situation is being managed.
amharic: የኩዌት ወታደራዊ ኃይል የአገሪቱን የአየር መከላከያ ሥርዓት በመጠቀም ኢራን የላከቻቸውን ድሮኖች እየመታ እንደሚገኝ አስታውቋል። በአካባቢው የሚሰሙት የፍንዳታ ድምፆች የመከላከያ ሥርዓቱ በጠላት ላይ ከወሰደው እርምጃ የመጡ መሆናቸውን ባለሥልጣናት አረጋግጠዋል። ህዝቡ በተረጋጋ ሁኔታ እንዲቆይ እና የደህንነት መመሪያዎችን እንዲከተል ተጠይቋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Kuweet, sirna ittisa qilleensa isaa fayyadamuun xiyyara nama hin feene (drones) Iraan ergame rukutuusaa beeksisera. Aangessoonni akka ibsanitti, sagaleen dhuka'aa bakkeewwan tokko tokkotti dhaga'amu sirni ittisaa xiyyaroota kana dursuun ittisuurraa kan dhufe dha. Ummanni tasgabbaa'ee akka turee fi qajeelfamoota nageenyaa mootummaan baase akka hordofu dhaamameera.

title: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
english: Protests have erupted across Ukraine following President Volodymyr Zelensky's sudden decision to remove popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Fedorov, who was praised for his anti-corruption efforts, indicated his dismissal followed disagreements with top military leadership regarding battlefield strategy. While Zelensky seeks to appoint a replacement, many citizens and commentators have expressed frustration over the move, labeling it a potential setback for the country.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ቮሎዲሚር ዘለንስኪ ታዋቂውን የመከላከያ ሚኒስትር ሚካሂሎ ፌዶሮቭን በድንገት ከስልጣናቸው ማንሳታቸውን ተከትሎ በተለያዩ የዩክሬን ከተሞች የተቃውሞ ሰልፎች ተካሂደዋል። በሙስና ላይ በሚያደርጉት ጥረት የሚታወቁት ፌዶሮቭ፣ ከስልጣን መነሳታቸው ከወታደራዊ መሪዎች ጋር በጦርነት ስልቶች ላይ በነበራቸው አለመግባባት የተፈጠረ መሆኑን ገልጸዋል። የዘለንስኪን ውሳኔ በመቃወም ብዙ ዜጎች ተቃውሟቸውን ሲገልጹ፣ ይህ እርምጃ በሀገሪቱ ላይ አሉታዊ ተጽእኖ ሊኖረው እንደሚችል ስጋታቸውን እያሰሙ ነው።
oromo: Prezidaant Volodimir Zeleniskin ministeera ittisa biyyaa bekamoo Mykhailo Fedorov hojii irraa ari'uu isaanii hordofee magaalaawwan gurguddoo Ukrayin keessatti mormiin guddaan ka'eera. Fedorov hojii manca'iinsa malaammaltummaa irratti hojjechaa turaniin kan beekaman yoo ta'u, ka'umsi ari'amuu isaanii hoogganoota waraana waliin mala waraanaarratti yaada garagaraa qabaachuu isaanii irraa akka ta'e ibsaniiru. Lammiileen hedduun murtii kana mormuun hiriira ba'aa jiran yoo ta'u, tarkaanfiin kun biyyattii irratti dhiibbaa hamaa geessisuu danda'a jechuun yaaddoo ibsachaa jiru.

title: Hundreds protest in Kyiv over Zelenskyy’s dismissal of defence minister
english: Hundreds of protesters gathered in Kyiv and other Ukrainian cities to demonstrate against President Zelenskyy’s decision to fire Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Supporters believe the outgoing minister was highly effective in reforming military procurement and fighting corruption, and they fear his removal could harm the war effort. The dismissal occurs as part of a significant cabinet reshuffle that includes replacing the prime minister and other high-ranking officials.
amharic: በኪየቭ እና በሌሎች የዩክሬን ከተሞች በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎች ፕሬዚዳንት ዘለንስኪ የመከላከያ ሚኒስትሩን ሚካሂሎ ፌዶሮቭን ከስልጣን ማባረራቸውን በመቃወም ሰልፍ ወጥተዋል። ደጋፊዎቹ ሚኒስትሩ በወታደራዊ ግዥ ማሻሻያ እና በሙስና ላይ ባደረጉት ትግል ውጤታማ እንደነበሩ ያምናሉ፣ መባረራቸውም ለጦርነቱ ጥረት እንቅፋት ይፈጥራል የሚል ስጋት አላቸው። ይህ የካቢኔ ለውጥ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትሯን ጨምሮ ሌሎች ከፍተኛ ባለስልጣናትንም ያካተተ ነው።
oromo: Namoonni dhibbaan lakkaʼaman magaalaa Kiyiv fi magaalota biroo keessatti Pirezidaant Zelenskiin Ministirri Ittisaa Mihayilo Fedoroov hojii irraa ariʼuu isaanii mormanii hiriira baʼaniiru. Deggertoonni ministirichaa, inni gurgurtaa meeshaalee waraanaa fi farra-malaammaltummaa irratti hojii gaarii hojjechaa waan tureef, kaafamuun isaa waraana biyyattii irratti dhiibbaa geessisuu dandaʼa jedhanii yaadu. jijjiirraan kabiine kun ministira muummee fi qondaaltota biroo bakka buusuus kan dabalatu dha.

title: Fire at orphanage in Algeria kills 11 people, including children
english: A tragic fire at a government-run orphanage in eastern Algiers resulted in the deaths of 11 people, including children, and left 19 others injured. The blaze broke out early Thursday morning at the Childhood Relief Institution, prompting an immediate response from emergency services to rescue those trapped inside. While the fire has been extinguished, authorities have initiated an investigation to uncover the cause of the disaster.
amharic: በአልጄሪያ ዋና ከተማ አልጀርስ በሚገኝ የመንግስት ወላጅ አልባ ህጻናት ማሳደጊያ ተቋም በተነሳ የእሳት አደጋ 11 ሰዎች ህይወታቸው አልፏል፣ ሌሎች 19 ሰዎች ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የእሳት አደጋው የተከሰተው ሐሙስ ሌሊት ሲሆን፣ የአደጋ ጊዜ ሰራተኞች ተጎጂዎችን ለማዳን ጥረት አድርገዋል። የሀገሪቱ ባለስልጣናት በድርጊቱ የተሰማቸውን ሀዘን የገለጹ ሲሆን፣ የእሳት አደጋውን መንስኤ ለማወቅ ምርመራ ተጀምሯል።
oromo: Aljeeriya magaalaa Aljeersitti bakka ijoollee harka qalleeyyii fi abbaa fi haadha hin qabne itti gargaaran irratti ibidda ka'een lubbuun namoota 11 darbeera, namoonni 19 immoo miidhaniiru. Ibidni kun kan ka'e Roobii gara ganamaa yoo ta'u, hojjettoonni gargaarsa ariifachiisaa namoota achi keessa turan baasuuf tattaaffii godhaniiru. Mootummaan biyyattii gadda isaa kan ibse yoo ta'u, sababa ibidda kanaa qorachuuf qorannoon eegalameera.

title: Climate funding: Who pays for the transition?
english: Developing nations require at least $2 trillion annually to manage climate change impacts, yet they bear little responsibility for the crisis compared to wealthy, fossil-fuel-reliant countries. Despite previous promises, support from developed nations is shrinking, and major institutions like the World Bank are reducing their climate financial commitments. This growing funding gap raises serious concerns about the global system's ability to protect the most vulnerable populations from extreme weather.
amharic: ታዳጊ ሀገራት የአየር ንብረት ለውጥን ለመቋቋም በየዓመቱ ቢያንስ 2 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር ያስፈልጋቸዋል፣ ነገር ግን ይህ ችግር እንዲፈጠር አነስተኛ አስተዋጽኦ ያደረጉት እነሱው ናቸው። ሀብታም አገሮች ቀደም ሲል የገቡትን የገንዘብ ድጋፍ ቃል እያጠፉ ሲሆን፣ እንደ የዓለም ባንክ ያሉ ተቋማትም የበጀት ድጋፋቸውን እየቀነሱ ይገኛሉ። ይህ የገንዘብ ክፍተት የአየር ንብረት ለውጥ ተጽዕኖ ለሚያርፍባቸው ተጋላጭ ሀገራት ትልቅ ስጋት ሆኗል።
oromo: Biyyoonni guddachaa jiran jijjiirama qilleensaa damdamachuuf waggaatti yoo xiqqaate tiriliyoona 2 dolaara kan barbaadan yoo ta'u, rakkoo kanaaf garuu gahee guddaa kan qaban biyyoota badhaadhani dha. Biyyoonni badhaadhonni gargaarsa maallaqaa kennuuf waadaa galaniis, yeroo ammaa deeggarsa isaanii hir'isaa jiru; akkasumas dhaabbileen akka Baankii Addunyaa gargaarsa isaanii gadi xiqqeessaniiru. Hanqinni maallaqaa kun biyyoota rakkoo kanaaf saaxilamoo ta'aniif balaa cimaa uumee jira.

title: ‘Safe passage’: The fatal ambiguity at the heart of the Hormuz MoU
english: A recent agreement meant to secure the Strait of Hormuz has quickly failed because its key terms were intentionally vague to allow for signing. By leaving the details of how the strait is managed and who controls it undefined, the deal gave Iran and the US conflicting interpretations of their rights. Consequently, the lack of clarity has led to a quick return to military blockades and rising tensions in the region.
amharic: የሆርሙዝ የባህር በርን ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ የተፈረመው ስምምነት ይዘቱ ግልጽ ባለመሆኑ በፍጥነት ሊከሽፍ ችሏል። ስምምነቱ የባህር መንገዱን በቁጥጥር ስር ማዋል ያለበት ማን እንደሆነ እና የአስተዳደር አሰራሩ ምን እንደሆነ በግልጽ ባለማስቀመጡ፣ አሜሪካ እና ኢራን ለግጭት እንዲጋለጡ አድርጓቸዋል። በዚህም ምክንያት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ውጥረት ተባብሶ ወደ ቀድሞው የጦርነት እና የማዕቀብ ሁኔታ ተመልሷል።
oromo: Hirmaannaan Hormuz nageenya akka qabaatuuf mallatteeffame, jechoota ifa hin taane waan qabuuf yeruma gabaabaa keessatti fashaleera. Waligalteen kun eenyutu karaa kana akka bulchu fi mirgi isaa maal akka ta'e ifatti waan hin kaa'iniif, Ameerikaa fi Iraan yaada wal faallessu akka qabaatan godheera. Kanaan wal qabatee, waligaltee kana keessatti wal hubannoon dhabamuun isaa waraana fi wal dhabdee naannichatti deebi'ee akka hammaatu taasiseera.

title: What is cyclospora? Diarrhoea symptoms, foods linked to US outbreak
english: Health officials in the US are investigating a significant rise in cyclosporiasis, an intestinal illness caused by a microscopic parasite. People typically contract the infection by consuming contaminated fresh produce, such as leafy greens or berries, rather than through person-to-person contact. While the condition causes persistent gastrointestinal issues, it is generally manageable with antibiotic treatment.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የጤና ባለስልጣናት በአጉሊ መነጽር በሚታይ ጥገኛ ተህዋሲያን አማካኝነት የሚከሰተውን የሳይክሎስፖሪያ በሽታ በአገር አቀፍ ደረጃ እየጨመረ መምጣቱን በመመርመር ላይ ናቸው። በሽታው በአብዛኛው የሚተላለፈው በቆሸሹ ትኩስ አትክልቶች ወይም ፍራፍሬዎች አማካኝነት እንጂ ከሰው ወደ ሰው አይደለም። ምንም እንኳን ይህ በሽታ ለረጅም ጊዜ የሚቆይ የሆድ ህመም ቢያስከትልም፣ በፀረ-ባክቴሪያ መድኃኒቶች አማካኝነት መዳን ይቻላል።
oromo: Ogeeyyiin fayyaa Ameerikaa dhukkuba garaa garaa kan saayikiloospooriyaa jedhamu, kan kutaalee qaamaa xiqqoo mul'atan hin dandeenyeen dhufu babal'achaa jiru qorachaa jiru. Dhukkubni kun baay'inaan kan daddarbu nyaata haaraa ykn muduraa qulqulluun isaa hin eeggamne nyaachuudhaan malee, namaa gara namatti miti. Dhukkubni kun rakkoo garaa garaa kan yeroodhaaf turu fiduu danda'us, qoricha vaayirasii ittisuun fayyufi ni danda'ama.

title: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
english: Hostilities between Iran and the United States have intensified as both nations exchange military strikes, threatening a fragile diplomatic agreement. Iran has targeted US bases across the Gulf region, while American forces have launched attacks on Iranian command centers and infrastructure to weaken their military capabilities. President Trump has warned Iran to return to negotiations or face further consequences, while the vital Strait of Hormuz remains closed.
amharic: ኢራንና አሜሪካ እያደረጉት ባለው ወታደራዊ ጥቃት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ውጥረት እያየለ መጥቷል። ኢራን በባህረ ሰላጤው አካባቢ በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎች ላይ ጥቃት የሰነዘረች ሲሆን፣ አሜሪካ በበኩሏ የኢራንን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም ያነጣጠረ እርምጃ ወስዳለች። ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ኢራን ወደ ድርድር ካልተመለሰች ተጨማሪ እርምጃ እንደሚወሰድ አስጠንቅቀዋል፤ ይህ በእንዲህ እንዳለም አስፈላጊው የሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የባህር መስመር ተዘግቶ ይገኛል።
oromo: Iraanii fi Ameerikaan wal-waraanatti deebi'uun isaanii waldhabdee biyyoota lamaanii hammaachisee jira. Iraan buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa naannawa Gulf jiran irratti haleellaa kan raawwatte yoo ta'u, Ameerikaanis aangoofi humna waraana Iraan laaffisuuf jecha bakkeewwan adda addaa haleeltee jirti. Pirezidaanti Traamp, Iraan mariitti hin deebitu taanaan tarkaanfiin cimaan akka fudhatamu akeekkachiisaniiru; haalli kun immoo daandii galaana Hormuz akka cufamu taasiseera.

title: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
english: FIFA is considering disciplinary action against Argentina's national football team following their display of a banner claiming sovereignty over the Falkland Islands after a victory against England. This political gesture during a World Cup match violates official sporting regulations regarding team conduct. The dispute stems from historical tensions between the two nations, and this incident mirrors a similar controversy from 2014 that resulted in a financial penalty for the Argentine Football Association.
amharic: ፊፋ በእንግሊዝ ላይ ካሸነፉ በኋላ ስለ ፋክላንድ ደሴቶች ባለቤትነት የሚገልጽ ባነር በማሳየታቸው በአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ ቡድን ላይ የእርምት እርምጃ ለመውሰድ እያሰበ ነው። በዓለም ዋንጫ ጨዋታ ወቅት የታየው ይህ የፖለቲካ መልዕክት ከስፖርት ህግ ውጭ በመሆኑ ቅጣት ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ጉዳዩ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ካለው የቆየ የድንበር ውዝግብ ጋር የተያያዘ ሲሆን፣ አርጀንቲና ተመሳሳይ ድርጊት በ2014 በመፈጸሟ የገንዘብ ቅጣት ተላልፎባት ነበር።
oromo: FIFA garee kubbaa miillaa Arjantiiyinaa irratti tarkaanfii adabbii fudhachuu mala; kunis ergaa Ingilizii injifatan booda waa'ee abbaa irrummaa oddoloota Faalklaandi ibsu agarsiisuun isaanii hordofee dha. Gochi siyaasaa tapha Waancaa Addunyaa irratti raawwatame kun seera ispoortii kan cabsu ta'uu FIFA ibseera. Walitti bu'iinsi kun biyyoota lamaan gidduutti seenaa dheeraa kan qabu yoo ta'u, Arjantiiyiniin waggaa 2014tti gocha wal fakkaataa raawwachuun ishee adabbii maallaqaa akka itti murtaa'u taasiseera.

title: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
english: A verdict is expected in the long-running trial concerning the 2018 collapse of the Morandi bridge in Genoa, which tragically killed 43 people. For years, families have sought accountability while prosecutors argued that maintenance was neglected to prioritize corporate profits. Defense teams have countered that an original design flaw was the primary cause of the structure's failure.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ በ2018 በጄኖዋ የሞራንዲ ድልድይ መፍረስ ምክንያት ለሞቱት 43 ሰዎች የፍርድ ውሳኔ በቅርቡ ይጠበቃል። ለዓመታት የሟች ቤተሰቦች ለደረሰው አደጋ ተጠያቂነትን ሲጠይቁ የቆዩ ሲሆን፣ አቃቤ ህግም የድልድዩ ጥገና ለትርፍ ሲባል ችላ እንደተባለ ይከራከራሉ። በሌላ በኩል የተከሳሾቹ ጠበቆች የድልድዩ መፍረስ ዋና ምክንያት በግንባታው ላይ የነበረው የንድፍ ጉድለት መሆኑን በመጥቀስ ይከራከራሉ።
oromo: Murtii dhaddacha kessatti bara 2018 kufuudhaan lubbuu namoota 43 galaafate darajaa Morandi kan magaalaa Jenoowa irratti ergaa dheeraa booda eegamaa jira. Maatiin midhaan irra gahe waggoota dheeraaf gaaffii itti gaafatamummaa kaasaa turan; gama biraatiin, qorattoonni himatamaa turan bu'aa dhaabbilee daldalaaf jecha suphuu irraanfatanii akka turan eeru. Gama biraatiin, abukaatonni himatamtootaa sababni guddaan kufuudha sanaa hanqina diizaayinii durii akka ta'e falmaachaa jiru.

title: US military to start screening for testosterone deficiency, Hegseth says
english: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has introduced a new policy requiring all active-duty and reserve military personnel aged 30 and older to be screened for testosterone deficiency during their annual health checkups. Soldiers diagnosed with low levels can choose to receive hormone replacement therapy to support their physical health and long-term well-being. While supporters claim this ensures a stronger force, some critics argue the initiative is an unnecessary focus on cultural issues rather than essential medical needs.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መከላከያ ሚኒስትር ፒት ሄግሴት በጦር ኃይሉ ውስጥ ዕድሜያቸው 30 እና ከዚያ በላይ የሆኑ ወታደሮች ዓመታዊ የጤና ምርመራ ሲያደርጉ ለቴስቶስትሮን እጥረትም እንዲመረመሩ አዲስ ሕግ አውጥተዋል። ዝቅተኛ የሆርሞን መጠን ያላቸው ወታደሮች በፈቃደኝነት የሕክምና ድጋፍ ማግኘት የሚችሉ ሲሆን፣ ይህም የአካላዊ ብቃታቸውንና የረጅም ጊዜ ጤንነታቸውን ለመጠበቅ ያለመ መሆኑ ተገልጿል። ሆኖም ይህ ውሳኔ አስፈላጊ የሕክምና አገልግሎት ነው ወይስ በባህል ላይ ያተኮረ አላስፈላጊ ጉዳይ የሚለው ክርክር አስነስቷል።
oromo: Ministirri ittisa biyyaa Ameerikaa Piit Heegseth, miseensonni waraanaa umuriin isaanii 30 fi sanaa ol ta'e hundi qormaata fayyaa waggaa isaanii irratti dhabamuu hoormoonii 'testosterone'f akka qoraman labsaniiru. Duulli kun loltoonni qaama isaanii fi fayyaa isaanii cimaa akka ta'uuf yaadamee kan diriirfame yoo ta'u, namoonni dhibee kana qaban wal'aansa hoormoonii fedhiin akka argatan ni taasifama. Haata'u malee, tarkaanfiin kun haala fayyaa waraanaa fooyyessuuf kan gargaaru ykn dhimma aadaa irratti xiyyeeffate kan jedhu mormii fi yaada garaagaraa kaasuu danda'eera.

title: Actor Sam Neill died from pneumonia, agent confirms
english: Renowned New Zealand actor Sam Neill, famous for his iconic roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, has passed away at the age of 78 due to pneumonia. While he had previously battled blood cancer, his representatives confirmed he was cancer-free at the time of his death. His family plans to hold a private memorial service on his farm in New Zealand to celebrate his life and extensive acting career.
amharic: በጁራሲክ ፓርክ እና በፒኪ ብላይንደርስ ፊልሞች የሚታወቀው የኒውዚላንድ ተዋናይ ሳም ኒል በ78 ዓመቱ በሳምባ ምች ህመም ምክንያት ህይወቱ አልፏል። ከዚህ ቀደም በደም ካንሰር ሲሰቃይ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ በሞተበት ወቅት ከካንሰር ነጻ እንደነበር ተወካዮቹ አረጋግጠዋል። ቤተሰቦቹም በኒውዚላንድ በሚገኘው እርሻው ላይ የግል የቀብር ስነ-ስርዓት እንደሚያደርጉለት ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Aartistii beekamaa biyya Niwuu Ziilaand kan ta’e Sam Niil, filmiiwwan Jurassic Park fi Peaky Blinders keessatti qooda fudhate, umrii waggaa 78tti dhukkuba sombaatiin du’eera. Kana dura dhukkuba kaansarii dhiigaatiin qabamee kan ture ta’us, yeroo du’etti kaansarii irraa fayyee akka ture bakka buutonni isaa mirkaneessaniiru. Maatiin isaa sirna awwaalchaa dhuunfaa qabeenya isaa kan Niwuu Ziilaand keessatti argamuutti raawwachuuf karoorfataniiru.

title: FIFA World Cup final: Date, time, halftime show, prediction and Trump
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina is scheduled for Sunday, July 19, at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. The event will feature a unique halftime show with global music stars and a closing ceremony, with US President Donald Trump expected to present the trophy to the winner. Statistics indicate that Spain is the favorite to secure the victory during regulation time.
amharic: የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል እሁድ ሐምሌ 19 ቀን በኒው ጀርሲ ሜትላይፍ ስታዲየም ይካሄዳል። ውድድሩ ታዋቂ የሙዚቃ ኮከቦች የሚሳተፉበት አዝናኝ የእረፍት ጊዜ ፕሮግራም እና የመዝጊያ ስነ-ስርዓት ይኖረዋል። የአሜሪካው ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ለአሸናፊው ቡድን ዋንጫውን እንደሚያስረክቡ ይጠበቃል፤ ስፔን ጨዋታውን በሰዓቱ የማሸነፍ እድል ሰፊ እንደሆነም ተገምቷል።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti godhamu Dilbata Adoolessa 19, dirree MetLife Stadium, Niiw Jarseyitti gaggeeffama. Taphi kun qophii bashannansiisaa fi sirna xumuraa kan taphattoota beekamoo of keessatti qabatu ta'a. Pireezidaantiin Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraamp injifattootaaf waancaa kan kennan yoo ta'u, qorannoon statistiksii akka agarsiisutti Ispeen injifachuu dandeessi jedhamee eegama.

title: Why Italy’s Genoa bridge collapse led to one of its biggest criminal trials
english: In 2018, the Morandi bridge in Genoa, Italy, collapsed during a storm, resulting in the tragic deaths of 43 people. Legal proceedings are currently underway to hold those responsible accountable for the disaster, which investigators linked to long-term maintenance neglect and structural corrosion. Families of the victims are hopeful that this significant criminal trial will finally provide justice for the preventable loss of life.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ. በ2018 በጣሊያን ጄኖዋ ከተማ የሞራንዲ ድልድይ በከባድ ዝናብ ምክንያት በመፍረሱ 43 ሰዎች ህይወታቸውን አጥተዋል። አደጋው የደረሰው ለረጅም ጊዜ በቂ ጥገና ባለመደረጉ እና የብረት ክፍሎቹ በመበላሸታቸው እንደሆነ ምርመራዎች ያመለክታሉ። አሁን እየተካሄደ ያለው ትልቅ የወንጀል ችሎት ለሟቾች ቤተሰቦች ፍትህን ለማምጣት ያለመ ሲሆን፣ በግድየለሽነት ለደረሰው ጉዳት ተጠያቂዎችን ለመቅጣት እየሰራ ነው።
oromo: Bara 2018 biyya Xaaliyaanii magaalaa Genoa keessatti, daandiin riqicha Morandi jedhamu erga diigamee booda lubbuun namoota 43 darbeera. Qorannoon akka agarsiisutti, balaan kun kan uumame gartuun kun yeroo dheeraaf suphaa barbaachisu waan hin argatiniif fi sibiiltonni isaa waan dhumanifi. Yeroo ammaa kana abbaan alangaa namoota balaa kanaaf itti gaafatamtoota ta'an irratti seeraan tarkaanfii fudhachuuf qormaata guddaa taasisaa jiru; kunis maatii miidhamtootaaf haqni akka argamuuf kan gargaaruudha.

title: Vance says Epstein had connections to US, Israeli intelligence
english: US Vice President JD Vance recently stated that the late Jeffrey Epstein maintained high-level connections with both American and Israeli intelligence agencies. During a podcast interview, Vance claimed these Israeli ties appeared to be linked to left-leaning elements of the nation’s political establishment. Additionally, Vance admitted that the Trump administration failed to manage public transparency effectively regarding the release of Epstein-related documents.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ምክትል ፕሬዝዳንት ጄዲ ቫንስ፣ ጄፍሪ ኤፕስታይን ከአሜሪካ እና ከእስራኤል የስለላ ተቋማት ጋር ከፍተኛ ግንኙነት እንደነበረው ገለጹ። በቃለ-መጠይቃቸውም፣ እነዚህ የእስራኤል ግንኙነቶች ከሀገሪቱ የፖለቲካ ግራ ዘመም ክፍሎች ጋር የተሳሰሩ እንደሆኑ ተናግረዋል። በተጨማሪም ቫንስ፣ የትራምፕ አስተዳደር ከኤፕስታይን ሰነዶች ጋር በተያያዘ ግልጽነትን ለማስፈን እና መረጃዎችን ለማስተላለፍ በኩል ክፍተት እንደነበረባቸው አምነዋል።
oromo: Itti aanaa pirezidantii Amerikaa JD Vance akka jedhanitti, Jeffrey Epstein qaamolee basaasaa Amerikaa fi Israa'elii wajjin hariiroo cimaa qaba ture. Gaafii fi deebii taasise kanaan, hariiroon Epstein Israa'elii wajjin qabu gara bitaatti kan goruu fi siyaasa biyyattii wajjin kan walqabatu akka ta'e ibseera. Kana malees, Vance bulchiinsi Trump ragaalee Epstein ilaalchisee iftoomina uumuu fi odeeffannoo sirriitti dabarsuu irratti hanqina akka qabaatan amaneera.

title: US releases video of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has made public footage of recent airstrikes conducted against targets within Iran. These attacks focused on missile facilities and coastal defense technology located near the Strait of Hormuz. Following the strikes, reports from Iranian media confirmed that multiple explosions occurred in several areas, including Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኢራን ውስጥ ያደረሰውን የአየር ጥቃት የሚያሳይ ምስል ይፋ አድርጓል። ጥቃቶቹ በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር አቅራቢያ የሚገኙ የሚሳኤል መሠረተ ልማቶችን እና የባህር ዳርቻ መከላከያ ስርዓቶችን ያነጣጠሩ ነበሩ። የኢራን መገናኛ ብዙኃን ባወጡት መረጃ በባንዳር አባስ እና በቃሽም ደሴት አካባቢ ፍንዳታዎች እንደተሰሙ አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Waraanni Ameerikaa miidiyaalee irratti vidiyoo haleellaa qilleensa irraa gara biyya Iranitti raawwate ifa godheera. Haleellaan kun kan xiyyeeffate lafa qarqara galaana Hormuz irratti bakka meeshaalee waraanaa fi dhuka'aa gurguddaa fi sirna ittisaa Iranitti ture. Gabaasni miidiyaalee Iran akka ibsutti, haleellaa kanaan booda magaalaalee Bandar Abbas fi qarqara bishaan qarqara Qeshm irratti dhuka'a guddaan dhaga'ameera.

title: US strikes Iran, tanker, as Tehran hits Kuwait, Jordan: What’s the latest
english: The United States military has escalated its campaign against Iran by conducting strikes near Tehran and hitting multiple military assets, including an oil tanker in the Strait of Hormuz. These actions are a direct response to Iran’s earlier attacks on commercial shipping vessels, leading to significant casualties and widespread destruction across several Iranian cities. The intensifying conflict has now spread to regional neighbors, with Iran reportedly targeting US assets in nearby Gulf countries.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በቴህራን አቅራቢያ ጥቃቶችን በመፈጸም እና በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የሚገኝ የነዳጅ መርከብን በማውደም ከኢራን ጋር ያለው ግጭት ተባብሷል። ይህ የአሜሪካ እርምጃ የኢራን የንግድ መርከቦችን የማጥቃት ድርጊት ተከትሎ የመጣ የበቀል እርምጃ ሲሆን በበርካታ የኢራን ከተሞች ከፍተኛ ጉዳት እና ሞት አስከትሏል። ግጭቱ አሁን ወደ ጎረቤት የባህረ ሰላጤ አገሮች እየተዛመተ ሲሆን ኢራንም በአካባቢው የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ንብረቶችን እያጠቃች ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Ameerikaa Teheranitti dhihoo jiru miidhaa geessisuufi bidiruu boba'aa 'Strait of Hormuz' keessa jirtu rukutuun waraana biyyattii waliin qabu daran hammaateera. Tarkaanfiin Ameerikaa kun kan fudhatame bidiruuwwan daldalaa Iran rukutuushee hordofee yoo ta'u, magaalaawwan Iran hedduu keessatti lubbuun namootaa akka darbuu fi miidhaan guddaan akka ga'u taasiseera. Waraanni kun amma gara biyyoota Gulfiitti babal'achaa kan jiru yoo ta'u, Iranis qabeenya waraana Ameerikaa kan naannoo sana jiru rukutuun deebii laachaa jirti.

title: TPLF’s New Proclamation Codifies a Police State
english: The TPLF has introduced a new regional law, Proclamation No. 366/2018, which grants the government extreme powers including warrantless arrests, media censorship, and the use of the death penalty. Critics argue this measure is constitutionally invalid because a regional state lacks the authority to enact laws governing national defense, treason, or capital punishment. Furthermore, the council responsible for this proclamation is viewed as lacking a legitimate political mandate, raising concerns that the law will be used to suppress dissent and violate human rights in Tigray.
amharic: ህወሓት አዲስ የወጣው አዋጅ ቁጥር 366/2018 ያለፍርድ ቤት ትዕዛዝ ማሰርን፣ የመገናኛ ብዙሃን ነፃነትን መገደብንና የሞት ቅጣትን ጨምሮ እጅግ አፋኝ ስልጣናትን ለክልሉ መንግስት ይሰጣል። ይህ ህግ የክልል መንግስት በሀገር አቀፍ የፀጥታ፣ የክህደት እና የሞት ቅጣት ጉዳዮች ላይ የመደንገግ ስልጣን ስለሌለው ህገ-መንግስታዊ መሰረት የለውም ተብሎ ተተችቷል። በተጨማሪም፣ አዋጁን ያወጣው ምክር ቤት ህጋዊ ስልጣን እንደሌለው በመግለጽ፣ ይህ ሰነድ በህዝቡ ላይ ተቃውሞን ለማፈን እና ሰብአዊ መብቶችን ለመጣስ እንደሚውል ስጋት ተፈጥሯል።
oromo: TPLF labsiin lakkoofsa 366/2018 jedhamu kan haaraa baase, mootummaaaf mirga namaa sarbuu fi akka fedhetti hidhuu, miidiyaalee ukkaamsuu fi adabbii du'aa fayyadamuu dabalatee aangoo cimaa kenna. Labsichi mootummaan naannoo tokko dhimmoota ittisa biyyaa, gantuu fi adabbii du'aa irratti seera baasuuf aangoo waan hin qabneef, bu'uura seeraa kan hin qabne ta'uun isaa dubbatameera. Kana malees, qaamni labsicha baase kun aangoo siyaasaa kan hin qabne waan ta'eef, seera kanaan uummata Tigraay irratti dhiibbaa uumuufi mirga namaa sarbuuf itti fayyadamuun isaa sodaachiseera.

title: Ethiopia Cannot Afford Another Disaster
english: The author argues that Ethiopia remains at a critical crossroads, warning that political leaders must prioritize long-term peace over risky maneuvers to avoid a return to the devastating violence seen in Tigray. Despite the Pretoria Agreement, the slow pace of implementation has left citizens in a state of ongoing economic hardship and instability. True stability requires courageous leadership that chooses compromise over fear-mongering to ensure the country does not spiral back into a regional catastrophe.
amharic: ጸሐፊው ኢትዮጵያ በአስቸጋሪ ወቅት ላይ እንደምትገኝ በመግለጽ፣ የፖለቲካ መሪዎች ወደ ቀድሞው አስከፊ ግጭት ላለመመለስ ከስልጣን ጥማት ይልቅ ዘላቂ ሰላምን ቅድሚያ ሊሰጡ እንደሚገባ ያስጠነቅቃሉ። የፕሪቶሪያው የሰላም ስምምነት ቢኖርም፣ አፈጻጸሙ ዘገምተኛ በመሆኑ ዜጎች በኢኮኖሚ እና በማህበራዊ ችግር ውስጥ እንዲቆዩ አድርጓል። ሀገሪቱን ከከፋ ውድቀት ለመታደግ መሪዎች በድፍረት የሰላም አማራጭን በመከተል ለግጭት የሚዳርጉ ድርጊቶችን ማቆም አለባቸው።
oromo: Barreessaan kun Itoophiyaan yeroo muddamaa keessa akka jirtu ibsuun, hogganoonni siyaasaa gara walitti bu'iinsa duraanii deebi'uu dhiisanii nageenyaaf dursaa kennuu akka qaban akeekkachiisa. Waliigalteen Pretooriyaa mallatteeffamus, raawwiin isaa waan hir'ateef lammiileen rakkoo diinagdee fi tasgabbii dhabuu keessa jiru. Biyyi kun gara balaa biraatti akka hin darbineef, hogganoonni sodaa fi wal-shakkii caalaa wal-hubannoo fi nageenya filachuun barbaachisaadha.

title: Washington’s Ethiopia Reset Risks Rewarding Impunity
english: The United States is moving to rebuild diplomatic ties with Ethiopia, prioritizing security and economic partnerships despite the government's history of conflict and human rights concerns. Critics argue that this approach ignores the reality of Ethiopia’s transactional foreign policy and risks legitimizing a regime that prioritizes self-preservation over democracy. By overlooking the systemic issues that led to past wars, Western powers may be failing to hold the government accountable for its actions.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግስት በኢትዮጵያ ያለውን የፖለቲካ ቀውስ እና የሰብአዊ መብት ጥሰት ችላ በማለት ከኢትዮጵያ ጋር አዲስ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ለመመስረት እየጣረ ነው። ተቺዎች እንደሚሉት ይህ አካሄድ የመንግስትን ስልጣን የማቆየት ዓላማ ላይ ያተኮረ የውጭ ግንኙነት ስልት ችላ በማለት፣ ለተጠያቂነት መጥፋት ምክንያት ሊሆን ይችላል። ምዕራባውያን አገራት ለዴሞክራሲያዊ ለውጥ አስፈላጊ የሆኑ መሰረታዊ ማሻሻያዎች ሳይደረጉ አጋርነታቸውን ማሳየታቸው አደገኛ እንደሆነ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa rakkoolee mirga namoomaa fi sababa waraanaatti darbee, hariiroo dippilomaasii Itoophiyaa waliin haaromsuuf carraaqqii gochaa jira. Qeeqqonni akka jedhanitti, tooftaan kun fedhii mootummaan of-ittisuuf qabu kan jajjabeessu fi haqni akka hin mirkanoofne kan taasisu dha. Biyyoonni dhihaa hoggansa Itoophiyaa kan sirreessuu danda'an jijjiirama dhugaa osoo hin gaafatin hariiroo cimsuun isaanii, gaga'ama siyaasaa fi nageenyaa biyyattii irratti dhiibbaa hamaa geessisuu danda'a.

title: Pretoria’s Unfinished Peace Is Fueling Tigray’s New Crisis
english: Concerns are rising that a new conflict could erupt in Ethiopia's Tigray region due to the failure to fully implement the 2022 Pretoria Peace Agreement. Key issues, including the return of displaced people, the status of contested territories, and Tigray's full reintegration into the federal system, remain unresolved. Instead of a stable post-war order, the situation has deteriorated because essential political and administrative reforms were deferred rather than settled.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ በ2022 የተደረሰው የፕሪቶሪያ የሰላም ስምምነት ሙሉ በሙሉ ተግባራዊ ባለመደረጉ በኢትዮጵያ ትግራይ ክልል አዲስ ግጭት ሊቀሰቀስ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ተፈጥሯል። የተፈናቃዮች መመለስ፣ አወዛጋቢ የሆኑ ግዛቶች ጉዳይ እና የክልሉ ወደ ፌዴራል ስርዓት መመለስ እስካሁን መፍትሄ አላገኙም። እነዚህ መሰረታዊ የፖለቲካ እና የአስተዳደር ጉዳዮች ሳይፈቱ በመቆየታቸው በአካባቢው የነበረው አንጻራዊ ሰላም ወደ መፍረስ ደረጃ ደርሷል።
oromo: waliigalteen nagaa bara 2022 Pretooriyaatti mallatteeffame guutummaatti hojiirra ooluu dhabuun isaa naannoo Tigraayitti waraanni biraa dhalachuu danda'a jedhanii akka sodaatan taasiseera. Rakkooleen gurguddoon akka namoota buqqa'an deebisuu, lafa walitti bu'iinsaa fi Tigraay gara caasaa federaalaatti deebisuu furmaata hin arganne. Rakkooleen siyaasaa fi bulchiinsaa kun furmaata waaraa waan hin argatiniif, haalli naannichaa gara rakkoo hamaatti jijjiiramaa jira.

title: The AU Turned Pretoria Into Abiy’s Shield
english: The 2022 Pretoria Agreement, mediated by the African Union to end the Tigray war, is now criticized for failing to implement promised peace and accountability. Observers argue the AU acted with clear bias toward the Ethiopian government, demonstrated by its dismissive rhetoric and the cancellation of a human rights investigation into mass atrocities. Consequently, critics suggest the agreement served more as a political shield for Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed than as a genuine framework for lasting stability.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ በ2022 በአፍሪካ ህብረት አደራዳሪነት የተፈረመው የፕሪቶሪያ የሰላም ስምምነት፣ የተገባለትን ቃል ባለመጠበቁ እና ተጠያቂነትን ባለማስፈኑ ትችት እየቀረበበት ይገኛል። የአፍሪካ ህብረት በግጭቱ ወቅት ለኢትዮጵያ መንግስት ወግኗል በሚል የሚነቀፍ ሲሆን፣ በተለይም በትግራይ የተፈጸሙ የሰብአዊ መብት ጥሰቶችን የሚመረምር ኮሚሽንን ስራ በድንገት ማቆሙ በገለልተኛነቱ ላይ ጥያቄ አስነስቷል። ይህ ስምምነት ዘላቂ ሰላምን ከመገንባት ይልቅ፣ ለጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አቢይ አህመድ አስተዳደር እንደ አንድ የፖለቲካ መከላከያ ጋሻ ሆኖ ማገልገሉን ተቺዎች ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: waliigalteen nagaa Pretoria kan bara 2022, kan gamtaa Afrikaan giddu galeessa ta'ee garaa garaa ta'e, waadaa galamee ture kabachiisuu fi gaafatamummaa mirkaneessuun laafina qabaachuu isaa irratti komiin cimaan ka'aa jira. Gamtaan Afrikaa waraana Tigraay keessatti mootummaa Itoophiyaa bira dhaabachuu isaa kan agarsiisan gochoota fi ibsoota fudhatee ture; keessumaa qorannoo yakka waraanaa fi sarbama mirga namoomaa irratti gaggeeffamaa ture tasuma dhaabuun isaa amanamummaa isaatti shakkii fideera. Kanaafuu, waliigalteen kun nagaa waaraa fiduu mannaa, mootummaa Abiy Ahmed ittiin of ittisan meeshaa siyaasaa ta'ee akka tajaajile namoonni hedduun ni dubbatu.

title: Decades In, CCD Keeps the Keys, Sends the Invoices
english: Residents of the Country Club Developers (CCD) gated community in Addis Abeba are frustrated by ongoing demands for extra payments, such as a recent threat to cut off water for those who do not pay 35,000 Birr. Despite buying their homes decades ago, the developer maintains control over the estate and has failed to complete the promised infrastructure and amenities. The core conflict stems from a disagreement over whether the original purchase agreements included finished facilities or if residents are now responsible for funding the remaining construction.
amharic: በአዲስ አበባ ዳርቻ የሚገኘው የካንትሪ ክለብ ዴቨሎፐርስ (CCD) ነዋሪዎች ተጨማሪ ክፍያ እንዲከፍሉ በመጠየቁ ቅሬታቸውን እየገለጹ ነው። ገንቢው ድርጅቱ ከብዙ ዓመታት በፊት መረከብ የነበረባቸውን የጋራ መኖሪያ ቤት አስተዳደር እስካሁን ሳይለቅ፣ የተለያዩ መሰረተ ልማቶችን ባለማሟላቱ ውዝግብ ተፈጥሯል። ነዋሪዎቹ የገዙት የተሟላ ቤት እንደሆነ ቢናገሩም፣ ገንቢው ግን ለቀሪው ግንባታ ተጨማሪ ገንዘብ መጠየቁ ለችግሩ መነሻ ሆኗል።
oromo: Ogeeyyoonni qubannaa mana jireenyaa kan 'Country Club Developers' (CCD) jedhamu, maallaqa dabalataa akka kaffalan dirqisiisuun isaan aarseera. Manneen isaanii waggoota hedduu dura kan bitan ta'us, qindeessaan ijaarsaa kun to'annoo gadi hin lakkifne akkasumas bu'uuraalee misoomaa kakuu gale hin guunne. Falmiin guddaan kunis, bitattoonni manaa ofii isaanii guutummaatti xumurame bitne jedhanii yoo amanann, qindeessaan garuu ijaarsa hafeef kaffaltii dabalataa gaafachaa jiraachuu isaatiin kan dhufeedha.

title: City Levy Lands on Hotels Before the Registers Get Ready
english: The Addis Abeba City Administration has introduced a five percent municipal tax on all hotel stays, effective June 19, 2026, to fund urban infrastructure and services. Hotels are now required to update their payment systems to collect this tax and maintain detailed guest records to ensure compliance. Failure to pay on time will result in financial penalties, and the city has linked the renewal of hotel business licenses directly to their tax payment history.
amharic: የአዲስ አበባ ከተማ አስተዳደር የከተማዋን መሠረተ ልማት እና አገልግሎቶች ለማሻሻል በሚል ከሰኔ 12 ቀን 2018 ዓ.ም ጀምሮ በሆቴል ማረፊያ አገልግሎቶች ላይ የአምስት በመቶ የከተማ ግብር መጣል ጀምሯል። ሆቴሎች ይህንን ግብር ለመሰብሰብ የክፍያ ስርዓታቸውን እንዲያስተካክሉ እና ዝርዝር የደንበኞች መረጃ እንዲይዙ ይጠበቅባቸዋል። የንግድ ፈቃድ እድሳትም ከዚህ የግብር አከፋፈል ጋር የተያያዘ በመሆኑ፣ የግብር ግዴታቸውን ያልተወጡ ሆቴሎች በህግ ተጠያቂ ይሆናሉ።
oromo: Bulchiinsi Magaalaa Finfinnee tajaajila hoteelaa hunda irratti gibira magaalaa dhibbeentaa shan irratti hundaa'e Waxabajjii 12, 2018 irraa eegalee hojiirra oolcheera. Gibirri kun kan ramadame tajaajilaa fi bu'uuraalee misoomaa magaalaa fooyyessuuf yoo ta'u, hoteelonnii sirna kaffaltii isaanii haaromsuudhaan galmee sirrii qabachuuf dirqama qabu. Hayyamni daldalaa hoteelotaa kan itti fufu yoo gibirichi sirnaan kaffalame qofa waan ta'eef, kanneen duubatti hafan irratti adabbiin kan fudhatamu ta'a.

title: Bahir Dar Stadium to Be Ready by September, a Tournament in Mind
english: The Bahir Dar International Stadium is over 90 percent complete and is expected to be fully ready by this September. The final phase focuses on installing imported equipment like lighting and electrical systems to meet updated FIFA and international standards. This major renovation, funded largely by the MIDROC Investment Group, ensures the stadium is now equipped with modern facilities necessary for hosting global football matches.
amharic: የባህር ዳር ዓለም አቀፍ ስታዲየም ግንባታ ከ90 በመቶ በላይ የተጠናቀቀ ሲሆን በዘንድሮው መስከረም ወር ሙሉ ለሙሉ ለአገልግሎት ዝግጁ እንደሚሆን ይጠበቃል። የቀሩት ስራዎች የፊፋን እና የአለም አቀፍ ደረጃዎችን ለማሟላት የሚያስፈልጉ የብርሃን እና የኤሌክትሪክ መሳሪያዎችን መግጠምን ያካትታሉ። በዋናነት በሚድሮክ ኢንቨስትመንት ግሩፕ ድጋፍ እየተከናወነ ያለው ይህ ፕሮጀክት፣ ስታዲየሙ ለዓለም አቀፍ የฟุตบอล ውድድሮች የሚያስፈልጉ ዘመናዊ መገልገያዎችን እንዲያሟላ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Ijaarsi buufata ispoortii idil-addunyaa Bahir Daar dhibbeentaa 90 ol kan xumurame yoo ta'u, ji'a Fulbaana dhufu keessa guutumaatti xumuramee tajaajilaaf qophaa'a jedhamee eegama. Hojiiwwan hafan, sadarkaa FIFA fi idil-addunyaa guutuuf kan gargaaran ibsaa fi meeshaalee elektiriikii biyya alaa irraa dhufan dhaabuu dha. Pirojektiin kun kan deeggarame garee invastimantii Midrookitiin yoo ta'u, buufatichi dorgommiiwwan kubbaa miillaa idil-addunyaa keessummeessuuf meeshaalee barbaachisoo ta'an akka qabaatu taasiseera.

title: Authority Pins Hope on a Coffee Fund as Trees Grow Old
english: The Ethiopian Coffee & Tea Authority is launching a new 'Coffee Fund' to help farmers and exporters manage the financial risks caused by volatile global prices and aging coffee trees. Since nearly 80 percent of the nation's coffee trees are old and less productive, this initiative will act as a form of insurance to provide compensation during market downturns. A technical committee is currently working on the legal frameworks and operational strategies to define how this reserve will be managed and funded.
amharic: የኢትዮጵያ ቡና እና ሻይ ባለስልጣን በአለም አቀፍ የቡና ዋጋ መዋዠቅ እና በቡና እርሻዎች እርጅና ምክንያት ለሚፈጠሩ የገበያ ተግዳሮቶች መፍትሄ የሚሆን የቡና ፈንድ እያቋቋመ ነው። በአሁኑ ወቅት በሀገሪቱ የሚገኙ አብዛኛዎቹ የቡና ዛፎች አርጅተው ምርታማነታቸው የቀነሰ በመሆኑ፣ ይህ ፈንድ ገበያው ሲቀንስ አርሶ አደሮችን እና ላኪዎችን ለመደገፍ እንደ መድን ያገለግላል። ባለስልጣኑ የፈንዱን አሰራር እና አስተዳደር ለመወሰን ከባለድርሻ አካላት ጋር በመሆን የህግ ማዕቀፎችን እና የቴክኒክ ዝግጅቶችን እያከናወነ ይገኛል።
oromo: Abbaan taayitaa Bunaa fi Shayii Itoophiyaa gatiin bunaa addunyaa irratti jijjiiramuu fi muka bunaa dulloomuu irraa kan ka'e rakkoo muudatu hambisuuf 'Qabeenya Bunaa' jedhamu hundaa'uuf jira. Mukni bunaa biyyattii keessaa kutaadhibbeentaa 80 ol dulloomanii waan jiraniif, qabeenyi kun gabaan yeroo gad bu'u qonnaan bultootaa fi ergitoota bunaa gargaaruuf akka inshuraansii tokkootti tajaajila. Abbaan taayitaa kun qabeenya kana akkamitti akka gaggeeffamuufi seera isaa irratti qaamolee dhimmi ilaallatu waliin ta'uun qophiirra jira.

title: Production Soars While the Feed Sellers Go Under
english: Government reports indicate a massive surge in agricultural and poultry production under the 'Bounty of the Basket' initiative. However, small-scale traders and farmers are struggling to survive as the skyrocketing cost of animal feed makes their businesses unsustainable. This creates a contradiction where official statistics show record-breaking output while the people on the ground are forced to exit the industry due to financial pressure.
amharic: የመንግስት መረጃዎች እንደሚያሳዩት በ'ቅርጫቱ በረከት' መርሃ ግብር አማካይነት በግብርና እና በእንቁላል ምርት ላይ ከፍተኛ እድገት ታይቷል። ይሁን እንጂ፣ የእንስሳት መኖ ዋጋ መናር አነስተኛ ነጋዴዎችን እና አርሶ አደሮችን ለኪሳራ እየዳረገ ነው። ይህ ሁኔታ ኦፊሴላዊ መረጃዎች ከፍተኛ ምርት መኖሩን ቢናገሩም፣ በተግባር ግን ብዙ ባለሙያዎች ከገበያ እየወጡ መሆኑን የሚያሳይ አጣብቂኝ ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Gabaasni mootummaa akka agarsiisutti, sagantaa 'Bounty of the Basket' jedhamuun oomishni qonnaa fi hanqaaquu guddaa dabaleera. Haa ta'u malee, gatiin midhaan daakuu (feed) waan mi'aayef, daldaltoonni xixiqqoon fi qonnaan bultoonni hojii isaanii itti fufuu dadhabaniiru. Kunis, ragaaleen mootummaa oomishni guddachuu isaa yoo ibsanillee, namoonni dhuunfaatti hojjetan garuu miidhaa dinagdee kanaan hojii isaanii dhiisuuf dirqamaa akka jiran kan agarsiisuudha.
